title: Evidence hierarchy
script_summary: Explore the clear structure of evidence hierarchy in science versus the chaos of social media.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about evidence hierarchy than social media does.
In science, we rank evidence from strongest to weakest. But online, it’s a wild west.
At the top? Randomized controlled trials. Bottom? Anecdotes and opinions.
This hierarchy helps us gauge reliability. Without it, misinformation spreads like wildfire.
Understanding this can empower you to make informed choices and avoid pitfalls.
Want to learn more about evidence-based thinking? Hit that follow button!
